verse_text: 'He who has an ear, let him hear what the Spirit says to the churches. To him who overcomes I will give some of the hidden manna to eat. And I will give him a white stone, and on the stone new name written which no one knows except him who receives it. ' '

links.context: The name of the city is the New Jerusalem ([[REV.3:12]]), the Church, which has been and is now "continuing" ([[HEB.13:14]]) from the day on which Christ took His place in her midst. On the final day, when the Lord comes for His Bride, those who overcome will receive a "new name" ([[REV.2:17]])--the name of Christ revealed--on their foreheads ([[REV.22:4]]).
